requirement_topic.en: Restricted Substances and RoHS-like Horizontal Regime
requirement_topic.zh: 限用物质与类RoHS横向制度
requirement_topic.zht: 限用物質與類RoHS橫向制度

summary.en: Kenya has not confirmed an EU-style horizontal RoHS-like mandatory regime as a single entry gate for power tools. Substance control is therefore generally managed through sectoral, project, procurement, and general environmental pathways rather than one mandatory national product declaration replacing the KEBS route.
summary.zh: 肯尼亚未确认存在以欧盟式模式运作的、覆盖所有电动工具的横向RoHS类单一入场门槛。物质控制通常通过行业性、项目性、采购与一般环境路径处理，而非替代KEBS入口的一类统一产品声明。
summary.zht: 肯尼亞未確認存在以歐盟式運作模式的、覆蓋全部電動工具的橫向RoHS類單一入場門檻。物質控制通常透過行業性、項目性、採購與一般環境路徑處理，而非替代KEBS入口的一類統一產品聲明。

standards_or_laws: Environmental and procurement controls applied through sectoral and workplace channels in Kenya
No confirmed single national RoHS-like mandatory horizontal power-tool statute

summary.en: China commonly uses RoHS and GB/T substance documentation for electrical products. Those documents may still be relevant for customer or ecosystem expectations, but they do not create a confirmed Kenya EU-style horizontal legal substitution.
summary.zh: 中国通常使用RoHS和GB/T物质文件处理电气产品，这些文件可用于满足买方和合作体系预期，但不能作为肯尼亚确认的欧盟式横向法律替代。
summary.zht: 中國通常使用RoHS和GB/T物質文件處理電氣產品，這些文件可用於滿足買方和合作體系預期，但不能作為肯尼亞已確認的歐盟式橫向法律替代。

gap.en: The clear gap is overclaiming this as a mandatory, one-step Kenya legal gate. The practical position is to treat Kenya as no confirmed standalone national restricted-substances regime for power tools and avoid mapping EU-style RoHS declarations as mandatory in-country obligations.
gap.zh: 明确差距是过度宣传其为肯尼亚单一法定门槛。实际情形是肯尼亚未确认电动工具适用一套独立的横向限用物质法，故应避免将欧盟式RoHS声明描述为肯尼亚的强制国内义务。
gap.zht: 明確差距是將其誤作肯尼亞單一法定門檻來宣稱。實際情況是肯尼亞未確認電動工具適用獨立的橫向限用物質法，故應避免將歐盟式RoHS聲明描述為肯尼亞強制本地義務。

target.en: No confirmed single mandatory Kenya-wide RoHS-style horizontal regime for power-tool market entry. Claims should reflect sectoral and procurement reality instead of a universal law-style declaration.
target.zh: 未确认肯尼亚存在单一全国性RoHS式横向入场强制制度。要求表述应反映行业与采购现实，而非普遍法条式声明。
target.zht: 未確認肯尼亞存在單一全國性RoHS式橫向入場強制制度。要求表述應反映行業與採購現實，而非普遍法條式聲明。

cn.en: China material evidence and CCC support technical review, but do not create a Kenya-wide mandatory substances substitute.
cn.zh: 中国材料证据和CCC可支持技术审查，但不能替代肯尼亚全国性强制物质要求。
cn.zht: 中國材料證據和CCC可支援技術審查，但不能取代肯尼亞全國性強制物質要求。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed Kenya-wide mandatory RoHS-style power-tool gate; present substance controls as evidence for buyer, environmental, and sectoral expectations rather than a universal Kenya legal declaration requirement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 未确认肯尼亚存在覆盖全部电动工具的强制性RoHS式门槛；物质要求应作为买方、环境与行业预期证据来表述，而非普遍肯尼亚法定声明义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 未確認肯尼亞存在覆蓋全部電動工具的強制性RoHS式門檻；物質要求應作為買方、環境與行業預期證據來表述，而非普遍肯尼亞法定聲明義務。

requirement_topic.en: Cordless Tool Battery Compliance in Kenya
requirement_topic.zh: 肯尼亚无绳电动工具电池合规
requirement_topic.zht: 肯尼亞無繩電動工具電池合規

summary.en: No confirmed Kenya EU-style dedicated battery regulation equivalent is visible as a single product-level entry condition for power-tool batteries in the same way as EU battery legislation. Kenya obligations are treated through the broader KEBS PVoC/import-safety path, transport safety handling where relevant, and model-specific product requirements; no universal national battery passport or removability checklist is confirmed as mandatory in-country gate for all power-tool batteries.
summary.zh: 目前未确认肯尼亚存在与欧盟电池法类似、对所有电动工具电池作为统一产品入境强制条件的制度。肯尼亚义务主要通过KEBS PVoC/进口安全路径、相关运输安全要求和型号化产品要求处理；未确认普遍适用的全国性电池护照或可拆卸清单作为统一入境门槛。
summary.zht: 目前未確認肯尼亞存在與歐盟電池法類似、對所有電動工具電池作為統一產品入境強制條件的制度。肯尼亞義務主要透過KEBS PVoC/進口安全路徑、相關運輸安全要求和型號化產品要求處理；未確認普遍適用的全國性電池護照或可拆卸清單作為統一入境門檻。

standards_or_laws: KEBS PVoC and related import conformity pathway
Dangerous-goods transport requirements where lithium batteries are supplied
Model-specific product safety evidence in Kenya

summary.en: China filings commonly provide RoHS-style battery documents, GB/T or CCC-linked battery safety evidence, and transport evidence for lithium batteries. These are useful, but they should not be represented as meeting a mandatory Kenya standalone battery law gate.
summary.zh: 中国文件常提供RoHS风格电池文件、GB/T或CCC相关电池安全证据以及锂电运输证据。这些有参考价值，但不应表示其满足肯尼亚独立电池法门槛。
summary.zht: 中國文件常提供RoHS風格電池文件、GB/T或CCC相關電池安全證據以及鋰電運輸證據。這些有參考價值，但不應表示其滿足肯尼亞獨立電池法門檻。

standards_or_laws: GB/GBT battery safety and transport references

gap.en: The key gap is assuming EU-style battery obligations (passport, economic-operator duties, or removability law) apply in Kenya as a direct mandatory package. Kenya practice appears to evaluate the battery as part of the product-safety/import process rather than through a confirmed standalone battery regime.
gap.zh: 关键差距在于把欧盟式电池义务（电池护照、经营者义务、可拆卸规则）直接当作肯尼亚直接法定一揽子要求。肯尼亚更像是将电池作为产品安全与进口流程的一部分评估，而非通过已确认的独立电池制度。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距在於將歐盟式電池義務（電池護照、經營者義務、可拆卸規則）直接當作肯尼亞直接法定一攬子要求。肯尼亞更像是將電池作為產品安全與進口流程的一部分評估，而非透過已確認的獨立電池制度。

target.en: No confirmed mandatory Kenya-wide standalone battery-entry regime equivalent to the EU battery law structure is established in this lane. Battery evidence should align with KEBS import conformity and transport-safety outcomes when triggered.
target.zh: 本路线未确认肯尼亚存在欧盟电池法结构下的全国性独立电池入场制度。电池证据应与KEBS进口符合性及触发时的运输安全结果对齐。
target.zht: 本路線未確認肯尼亞存在歐盟電池法結構下的全國性獨立電池入場制度。電池證據應與KEBS進口符合性及觸發時的運輸安全結果對齊。

cn.en: Chinese battery evidence is useful but should be used to support technical review and commercial expectations, not as a standalone legal pass in Kenya.
cn.zh: 中国电池证据有参考价值，但应用于技术审查和商业预期支撑，而非作为肯尼亚单一法定通行证。
cn.zht: 中國電池證據有參考價值，但應用於技術審查和商業預期支撐，而非作為肯尼亞單一法定通行證。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No single EU-style Kenya-wide battery-entry regime appears confirmed; do not present battery passport language as mandatory for all Kenya power-tool battery packs.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 未确认存在统一的欧盟式肯尼亚电池入场制度；不应将电池护照措辞作为所有肯尼亚电动工具电池包的强制要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 未確認存在統一的歐盟式肯尼亞電池入場制度；不應將電池護照措辭作為所有肯尼亞電動工具電池包的強制要求。
